module.name: faq
module.description: Displays a set of Questions (Q) and Answers (A) beautifully.

snippet.label: Q&A (FAQ)
snippet.text: <!-- @faq --> What is the biggest advantage of this system? <!-- @ --> **Development speed is significantly faster.** You can build prototypes in half the time compared to conventional methods. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Displays questions and answers in a set.
